text.title: Eloquent Model: Fillable, Casts, Scopes, and Accessors
text.summary: Model definition with explicit $fillable whitelist, $casts, typed relationships, named scopes, and the Attribute::make() accessor API.

rule.statement: Always whitelist $fillable; never use $guarded = [] on any model.
rule.rationale: Guarded-empty models expose every attribute to mass assignment. Even fields like is_admin or password_hash can be set via $model->fill($request->all()) when $guarded is empty — a recurring CVE in agent-generated code.

rule.statement: Use Attribute::make() exclusively for accessors and mutators; never mix with legacy getXAttribute() on the same model.
rule.rationale: Mixing the two APIs on one model produces undefined behavior; the framework resolves accessor priority inconsistently across Laravel versions.
